page_content:
340 LASX - Certificate in Latin American Studies Education Abroad

LARC499 Independent Studies in Landscape Architecture (1-4 Credits) Independent studies in landscape architecture including field, studio or library research under the direction of a faculty member.

Prerequisite: 12 credits in LARC courses; or permission of AGNR-Plant Science & Landscape Architecture department.

Restriction: Must be in Landscape Architecture program; or must be in Plant Sciences program.

Repeatable to: 4 credits if content differs.
